questions.question: Which ministry recently launched the Good Governance Index?

options.label: B
options.text: Ministry of personnel, public grievances and pensions

answer.label: B
answer.text: Ministry of personnel, public grievances and pensions

questions.explanation: The Good Governance Index was launched by the ministry of personnel, public grievances and pension in light of the Good Governance Day. It is a tool for assessing the quality of governance in all states and UTs. It will apply in 3 categories: big states, UTs and the north-east and hill states.

questions.question: Which of the following is called the Falcon Capital of the World?
questions.explanation: Amur Falcons is a small migratory raptor that breeds in Southeastern Siberia and Northern China and migrates to Southern Africa through India during the winter months. The Doyang Lake in Nagaland is where these birds stop during their migration each year. Therefore, Nagaland is called the “Falcon Capital of the World”

questions.question: Which American firm is developing the Project Kuiper, which is to launch thousands of satellites into space?
questions.explanation: Amazon is set to launch over 3,000 satellites into space as part of the Project Kuiper. It will form a megaconstellation that will provide lost cost space internet to the public. The satellites are to operate from the Low Earth Orbit.

questions.question: The government recently announced free internet services to all villages by March of 2020. Which tool is going to be used to achieve this?
questions.explanation: The ministry of communication and information technology announced that all villages are to have free internet connection by March of 2020. This is to be achieved using the Bharatnet. The Bharatnet is a network infrastructure initiated in 2017 and funded by Universal Service Obligation Fund.

questions.question: The ASI recently discovered Sanskrit inscriptions about Saptamatrikas in Andhra Pradesh. These were issued by which king?
questions.explanation: The recently discovered inscription by ASI in Andhra Pradesh was issued by the Satavahana dynasty’s King Vijaya. It was written in Brahmi script about the cult of Saptamatrikas. It is the oldest example of its kind in South India.

questions.question: The upcoming Aditya L1 mission is to operate from which orbit?
questions.explanation: The Aditya L1 mission is India’s first solar mission. It is to be launched by ISRO in 2020. The ISRO announced that the probe will be operating from the Halo Orbit. It is a three dimensional orbit. It is to operate from Lagrangian point 1 (L1).

questions.question: Shaheed Udham Singh, whose 120th birth anniversary was observed recently, is most associated with which incident?
questions.explanation: Shaheed Udham Singh is a revolutionary born on December 26th, 1899 in Punjab. He is most associated with the Jallianwala Bagh tragedy at Amritsar. He is noted for his assassination of Michael O’Dwyer- who was the governor of Punjab at that time.

questions.question: Which country has recently decided to impose 3% digital tax on large tech companies from 2020?
questions.explanation: Italy had recently decided to impose new digital tax on tech giants like Google and Amazon. This is similar to France’s GAFA tax on Google, Amazon, Facebook and Apple. Italy’s digital tax regime will come to force on January 1st 2020.

questions.question: Which archipelago did Tropical Cyclone Sarai recently hit?
questions.explanation: The tropical cyclone Sarai had recently hit Fiji, a country in the South Pacific. It is an archipelago consisting of more than 300 islands. On its present track, the cyclone is forecasted to pass adjacent to Fiji’s main island Viti Levu and then may head towards Tonga, where the tropical cyclone warning centre has been alerted.

questions.question: The Purple Book that was recently launched during the “Eat Right Mela” deals with which of the following aspects?
questions.explanation: The Purple book was launched during the “Eat Right Mela” organised by the FSSAI. It is a handbook on diets for diseases. It gives general simplified guidelines to the hospitals on the suitable diets for common medical conditions like diabetes, hypertension, cancer, gut disorders etc.
